author: 777-cloud-boy
name: Inhibitory Layers on PR #1851 Stack
blurb: Non-record submission adding rank-22 low-rank inhibitory gates to attention and MLP residual paths on the PR #1851 SmearGate+LQER+TTT stack. Sigmoid-init at ~0.95 for gradient flow. SpellingBee disabled. Inhibitor weights serialized as row-int8. Single-seed post-TTT val_bpb 1.06438, ~0.003 above current SOTA 3-seed mean (1.06108).
